Purpose: Master working register for technical details, known constraints, what each team is bringing / requesting, and whether permission is needed to re-share details with confirmed participants.
Use this to track which pairings are recommended and whether re-share permission should be requested from each side before circulating technical details.
Observer-only and limited-participation organisations kept separate so they are not treated as core active integrations.
Added latest technical details from participant emails/screenshots, removed observers from Connection Details, and expanded Pairing & Share Requests for broader interoperability coverage.
